title: clermontia oblongifolia subsp. mauiensis
intro: Clermontia oblongifolia subsp. mauiensis, also known as Maui Clermontia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae native to the island of Maui in Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clermontia oblongifolia subsp. mauiensis include its ability to help soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
